notes: Repotted this spring into a slightly shallower pot; canopy still filling back in after a hard prune last fall.
Grown from a cutting six years ago. Ramification is finally starting to read as a broom from a distance.
First wiring pass on the main trunk line. Still deciding on final apex placement.
Summer defoliation to encourage finer ramification going into next season.
Candle-pinched in early summer. Needles should thin out nicely by fall.
Nebari is coming along after a root-spread repot two years ago.
The tree that ended up on the floor. Recovering well, all things considered.
Bloomed for the first time since I acquired it. Colors ran truer than expected.
Working on balancing canopy weight between the two trunks.
